items.name: Build + overflow sweep
items.evidence: npm run build exit 0; npx tsc --noEmit exit 0; 22 routes x 4 widths (320/360/390/1440px) = 0 overflows. ADDENDUM (2026-06-12): 390px discrepancy resolved. At 9d752ce (pre-fix), document.scrollWidth exceeds viewport at ALL widths (320–414px) on /, /configurations, /owners/intronode — primary cause: Navbar flex row (no mobile collapse) has intrinsic min-width ~417px. v3 gate 390px report was correct. Implementer ≤360px claim was accurate for card-grid sub-problem only (fixed in a243c57); Navbar overflow (fixed in 5a34ca0) was present at 390px. At 967d9b1 (post-fix): 0 overflows, 0 element escapes across all widths and routes. Verdict unchanged: PASS.

items.name: Auth + claim
items.evidence: Dev toggle present (DEV_LOGIN=1); 401 on unauth API; session userId attached to agent; claim submits as pending; Google absent without env vars

items.name: Dual registration + atomicity
items.evidence: Agent + team registered; db.transaction() in registerTeam(); cycle-13 register-team-success.png shows 2-member roster

items.name: Operational files
items.evidence: Private by default (201 visibility=private); anon GET private=401; publish gate 200 for clean file; anon GET public=200; auto-revert confirmed in DB; render view navigates and shows content; content_private never exposed
observations: content_public field appears alongside content alias in public file API response — redundant but not a security issue

items.name: Sanitizer adversarial
items.evidence: 13 detector types confirmed with original crafted test content; fail-closed 403; auto-revert DB verified; scan log append-only (IDs increment, no DELETE); mask round-trip [email] token in public content; disclosure text verbatim present in ReviewUI
confirmed_misses: Person names without PII context (no NER)
false_positives: Title Case heading text near context words fires counterparty-name finding

items.name: Evidence integrity
items.evidence: Cycle-01 blobs: 30 files diff IDENTICAL vs 9d752ce; Cycles 12-17: all have examiner-report.md with numbered defects, cycle-specific image references, non-templated verdicts; sanitizer evidence files present from cycle-14 onward

items.name: Hygiene
items.evidence: AgentLab traces: docs/constraints only, no UI source; reflog: no vercel-fork pushes in 9d752ce..967d9b1 range; husky: pre-commit fires (lint-staged prettier), no commit-msg hook
findings: gitleaks F1: hardcoded QA dummy SANITIZER_KEY in scripts/qa-shoot.sh (non-real credential)
gitleaks F2: DEV_FALLBACK_SECRET in src/lib/auth.config.ts (dev fallback, not production credential)
husky F3: no commit-msg hook; conventional commit format unenforced

findings.description: Hardcoded QA dummy SANITIZER_KEY (0123456789abcdef... sequence) — not a real credential
DEV_FALLBACK_SECRET hardcoded — explicit dev-only fallback, fails loudly in production
No .husky/commit-msg hook; commit message format not enforced
content_public field exposed alongside content alias in public file GET response — redundant, not a security issue
False positive: Title Case headings near context words fire confidential.counterparty-name findings
All-uppercase company names (INITECH, ACME) not detected by PROPER_NOUN_SEQ regex; disclosed in ReviewUI

hj_actions.action: Add .gitleaksignore for F1 (scripts/qa-shoot.sh SANITIZER_KEY) and F2 (DEV_FALLBACK_SECRET pattern) to clean CI scanner output
Add .husky/commit-msg with commitlint if conventional commit enforcement is intended policy
Implementer go-signal + HJ final browser pass before setting deploy_allowed: true
